message:
fix(models): refine per-model reasoning detection for Claude 3 Sonnet/Opus and Gemini variants

Expand model_is_reasoning() non-reasoning list: add claude-3-sonnet and
claude-3-opus (neither supports extended thinking, only Claude 3.5
Sonnet+ and Claude 4+ do). Consolidate gpt-4 variants into a single
id.starts_with("gpt-4") check covering gpt-4o, gpt-4-turbo, gpt-4-0613
etc. Consolidate Gemini non-reasoning check with clearer comments
distinguishing gemini-2.5+ reasoning from all other gemini variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
